vocab.sentence: I listen to music after school.
Does he play baseball? Yes, he does.
She plays football in her free time.
What does she do after school? She rides a bike.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 她放學後做什麼？她騎腳踏車。

vocab.sentence: Do you surf the Internet? Yes, I do.
What does he do after school? He watches TV.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他放學後做什麼？他看電視。

phrases.phrase: What do you do after school?
phrases.sentence: What do you do after school? I go jogging after school.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 你放學後做什麼？我放學後去慢跑。

phrases.sentence: Keep practicing! No pain, no gain.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 繼續練習！一分耕耘，一分收穫。

tips.label: What do you do after school?
tips.text: 詢問「你放學後做什麼？」用 What do you do after school? 回答用 I + 動詞片語 + after school。

tips.label: What does he/she do...?
tips.text: 詢問「他/她在...時做什麼？」用 What does he/she do + 時間片語？回答用 He/She + 動詞第三人稱單數形式。

notes.title: What do you do after school?（詢問你的課後活動）
notes.rule: What do you do after school? I + 動詞片語 + after school.
notes.description: 用 What do you do after school? 詢問課後活動。回答用 I + 動詞片語。
examples: What do you do after school? I go jogging after school.
What do you do after school? I play basketball after school.
I listen to music after school.

notes.title: What does he/she do in his/her free time?（詢問他人的休閒活動）
notes.rule: What does he/she do in his/her free time? He/She + 動詞(三單) + in his/her free time.
notes.description: 詢問第三者的休閒活動。注意三單動詞變化：play→plays, ride→rides, watch→watches, go→goes.
examples: What does he do in his free time? He plays baseball.
What does she do in her free time? She watches TV in her free time.

quiz.question: What ___ you do after school?
quiz.hint: 詢問 you 用助動詞 do。

quiz.question: What does she do after school? She ___ TV.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 she，watch 加 es。

quiz.question: What does he do in his free time? He ___ a bike.
quiz.hint: 第三人稱單數 he，ride 加 s。

quiz.question: What do you do after school? I ___ basketball after school.
quiz.hint: I 後面用動詞原形 play。
